name: Amber Courtyard
hero: Courtyard dinners, live tandoor aromas, and festive group tables.
description: Amber Courtyard is built for celebrations, combining elegant North Indian classics with a breezy evening setting.

reviews.name: Priya
reviews.comment: Perfect for birthdays and larger family dinners.

reviews.name: Arjun
reviews.comment: The service flow is fast even on busy evenings.

name: Harbor Plate
hero: Chef-led seafood tasting menus with candlelit harbor views.
description: Harbor Plate serves refined coastal plates, curated tasting menus, and private booth seating for special evenings.
imageLabel: Open kitchen with blue stone bar

reviews.name: Nikhil
reviews.comment: The chef's counter experience is worth every rupee.

reviews.name: Rhea
reviews.comment: A polished place for date night and anniversaries.

name: Sage Social
hero: Brunch energy, pastry bar indulgence, and easy group seating.
description: Sage Social is a flexible all-day destination with comfort food, flatbreads, dessert boards, and collaborative seating.
imageLabel: Modern cafe with soft green walls

reviews.name: Simran
reviews.comment: Great for casual lunches and team outings.

reviews.name: Karan
reviews.comment: The pastry bar makes it stand out from typical cafes.
